title: FW Request: variable for battery type (LiPo or LiFeP04)

messages.author: NerdHerder
messages.text: This would be useful so that the correct scale-factor is applied in converting from voltage to percentage, depending on battery chemistry
messages.content_html: This would be useful so that the correct scale-factor is applied in converting from voltage to percentage, depending on battery chemistry

messages.author: JDat
messages.text: Use coulomb counter instead of voltage measurement.
messages.content_html: Use coulomb counter instead of voltage measurement.
